title: How to get Ai API with unlimited requests?
author: Designeeli
text:
How to get Ai API with unlimited requests?
If you are a developer tired of hitting “rate limit exceeded” screens or managing complex token budgets, finding an AI endpoint with truly unlimited requests is the holy grail. Aisool.com offers a robust, OpenAI-compatible API designed to handle high-frequency integrations without the usual constraints.
🚀 Getting Started with Aisool API
To begin integrating, you first need to access your Developer Settings.
- Sign In: Access the Aisool.
- Generate Token: Manage your API tokens under the integration tab.
- Integration Choice: You can connect via the official SDK or direct HTTP endpoints.
Integration via SDK
The fastest way to get started in a JavaScript environment is via the official npm package:
Bash
npm install aisool-sdk
# or
pnpm add aisool-sdk
# or
yarn add aisool-sdk
🛠️ Implementation Examples
Aisool uses an OpenAI-compatible format, meaning if you’ve used GPT APIs before, you can switch to Aisool by simply changing the baseURL
and API_KEY
.
1. JavaScript / Node.js (Fetch)
const fetchData = async () => {
try {
const res = await fetch('https://api.aisool.com/v1/chat/completions', {
method: 'POST',
headers: {
'Content-Type': 'application/json',
'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'
},
body: JSON.stringify({
model: 'sool-max',
messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Hello AI!' }]
})
});
const data = await res.json();
console.log('AI Response:', data.choices[0].message.content);
return data;
} catch (err) {
console.error('API Error:', err);
}
};
2. Python
import requestsimport requests
def send_message(user_message):
url = "https://api.aisool.com/v1/chat/completions"
headers = {
"Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY",
"Content-Type": "application/json"
}
payload = {
"model": "sool-max",
"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": user_message}]
}
response = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers)
return response.json()['choices'][0]['message']['content']
📖 API Documentation: The Chat Endpoint
The Chat endpoint is the primary interface for AI conversations. It supports the sool-max
model for high-reasoning tasks.
Request Structure
- Endpoint:
POST https://api.aisool.com/v1/chat/completions
- Headers:
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
- Body: JSON containing
model
and an array ofmessages
.
Response Breakdown
choices[0].message.content
: The actual text generated by the AI.finish_reason
: Returns "stop" when the message completes successfully.usage
: While requests are unlimited, this field helps you track token density.
💎 Pricing: Truly Unlimited
Aisool stands out by offering flat-rate pricing for unlimited access, removing the stress of pay-per-token billing.
Feature | Monthly Plan | Yearly Plan (Best Value)
Price: $5/ month | $54/ year
Requests Per Day (RPD): Unlimited | Unlimited
Requests Per Minute (RPM): Unlimited | Unlimited
Tokens Per Minute (TPM): Unlimited | Unlimited
Pro Tip: When building your UI, store the response content
and the user's message locally to maintain a seamless conversation history for your users.
